overview: Fyra Group is a high-end luxury hospitality website for a premium hotel chain in Manali, Himachal Pradesh. The site showcases three distinct properties — Fyra Hotel, Fyra Aashiyana, and Fyra Aashapuri Snow Line — with a "Quiet Luxury" aesthetic blending modern minimalism with Himalayan grandeur. Features include cinematic hero imagery, parallax scrolling, property detail pages, masonry gallery, testimonials carousel, activities guide, and a contact form with WhatsApp concierge integration.
features: Cinematic hero with Property Selector widget
Three property detail pages with Overview, Gallery, and Booking sections
Masonry image gallery with responsive grid
Guest Stories testimonial carousel with 5 reviews
Contact form with inquiry fields and static map placeholder
Sticky gold Book Your Stay bar
Snow Peak White, Deep Forest Green, Champagne Gold palette
